channel.title: The Morning Lift
channel.description: Four positive stories in four minutes. Free audio, waiting for you when you wake up. Every morning, The Morning Lift brings you four uplifting, true stories — science, progress, kindness, and quiet wonder — to start your day on the right note.
channel.itunes:summary: Four positive stories in four minutes. Free audio, waiting for you when you wake up. Every morning, The Morning Lift brings you four uplifting, true stories — science, progress, kindness, and quiet wonder — to start your day on the right note.
channel.itunes:author: The Morning Lift

item.title: The Morning Lift — Thursday, June 11, 2026
item.description: Four positive stories to start your morning: (1) Sudan & South Sudan eliminate maternal & neonatal tetanus; (2) Wheelchair half-marathon records in Chicago (Romanchuk & McFadden); (3) EXCAP home-exercise program reduces "chemo brain"; (4) 40-million-year-old ant revealed in Goethe's amber via synchrotron CT.
item.itunes:summary: Four positive stories to start your morning: (1) Sudan & South Sudan eliminate maternal & neonatal tetanus; (2) Wheelchair half-marathon records in Chicago (Romanchuk & McFadden); (3) EXCAP home-exercise program reduces "chemo brain"; (4) 40-million-year-old ant revealed in Goethe's amber via synchrotron CT.

item.title: The Morning Lift — Wednesday, June 10, 2026
item.description: Four positive stories to start your morning: (1) Science / Materials — Cobalt's hidden topological states; (2) Environment / Conservation; (3) Sports / Soccer; (4) Innovation / Clean Transport — China's electric heavy trucks tip.
item.itunes:summary: Four positive stories to start your morning: (1) Science / Materials — Cobalt's hidden topological states; (2) Environment / Conservation; (3) Sports / Soccer; (4) Innovation / Clean Transport — China's electric heavy trucks tip.

item.title: The Morning Lift — Tuesday, June 9, 2026
item.description: Four positive stories to start your morning: (1) AI-designed universal coronavirus vaccine clears first human trial; (2) Low-temperature hydrogen catalyst cuts cost; (3) "House Made of Dawn" — largest Native American art survey at the New-York Historical; (4) Three Stanley Cup Final records in one game.
item.itunes:summary: Four positive stories to start your morning: (1) AI-designed universal coronavirus vaccine clears first human trial; (2) Low-temperature hydrogen catalyst cuts cost; (3) "House Made of Dawn" — largest Native American art survey at the New-York Historical; (4) Three Stanley Cup Final records in one game.

item.title: The Morning Lift — Monday, June 8, 2026
item.description: Four positive stories to start your morning: (1) Ocean protection crosses 10%; (2) Europe's largest 3D-printed affordable apartment building; (3) LEGO Foundation pledges $97M to the IRC for kids in conflict zones; (4) Two molecules repaired nerve damage in MS models.
item.itunes:summary: Four positive stories to start your morning: (1) Ocean protection crosses 10%; (2) Europe's largest 3D-printed affordable apartment building; (3) LEGO Foundation pledges $97M to the IRC for kids in conflict zones; (4) Two molecules repaired nerve damage in MS models.

item.title: The Morning Lift — Sunday, June 7, 2026
item.description: Four positive stories to start your morning: (1) Octopuses use mirrors to find food they can't see; (2) Europe sets a new dam-removal record; (3) Roman bridge found in the Aare riverbed; (4) Mirra Andreeva wins the French Open.
item.itunes:summary: Four positive stories to start your morning: (1) Octopuses use mirrors to find food they can't see; (2) Europe sets a new dam-removal record; (3) Roman bridge found in the Aare riverbed; (4) Mirra Andreeva wins the French Open.

item.title: The Morning Lift — Saturday, June 6, 2026
item.description: Four positive stories to start your morning: (1) Culture/Arts — "Another Wonderland": rescued WPA Alice murals open at MCNY; (2) Community/Food Access — MLK Center opens North End satellite food pantry, Newport RI; (3) Health/Ophthalmology; (4) Innovation/Photonics.
item.itunes:summary: Four positive stories to start your morning: (1) Culture/Arts — "Another Wonderland": rescued WPA Alice murals open at MCNY; (2) Community/Food Access — MLK Center opens North End satellite food pantry, Newport RI; (3) Health/Ophthalmology; (4) Innovation/Photonics.

item.title: The Morning Lift — Friday, June 5, 2026
item.description: Four positive stories to start your morning: (1) First evidence of magnetic fields on exoplanets; (2) 5,500-year-old high-altitude copper-working cave, Pyrenees; (3) Goya's San Antonio de la Florida frescoes restored, Madrid; (4) Amivantamab shrinks advanced head & neck cancer (OrigAMI-4).
item.itunes:summary: Four positive stories to start your morning: (1) First evidence of magnetic fields on exoplanets; (2) 5,500-year-old high-altitude copper-working cave, Pyrenees; (3) Goya's San Antonio de la Florida frescoes restored, Madrid; (4) Amivantamab shrinks advanced head & neck cancer (OrigAMI-4).

item.title: The Morning Lift — Thursday, June 4, 2026
item.description: Four positive stories to start your morning — science, progress, kindness, and wonder. Free audio, about five minutes.
item.itunes:summary: Four positive stories to start your morning — science, progress, kindness, and wonder. Free audio, about five minutes.

item.title: The Morning Lift — Monday, June 1, 2026
item.description: Four positive stories to start your morning — science, progress, kindness, and wonder. Free audio, about five minutes.
item.itunes:summary: Four positive stories to start your morning — science, progress, kindness, and wonder. Free audio, about five minutes.

item.title: The Morning Lift — Sunday, May 31, 2026
item.description: Four positive stories to start your morning: (1) Saturn's rotation puzzle solved by JWST (Science/Planetary); (2) Anacostia Community Museum opens "We Make History" with the Plummer family diary at its center (Community/Heritage); (3) Platypuses breeding again in Australia's Hacking River after 50+ year absence (Environment/Conservation); (4) England's first Dutch-style "fietsstraat" cycle street opens in Cambridge (Innovation/Urban).
item.itunes:summary: Four positive stories to start your morning: (1) Saturn's rotation puzzle solved by JWST (Science/Planetary); (2) Anacostia Community Museum opens "We Make History" with the Plummer family diary at its center (Community/Heritage); (3) Platypuses breeding again in Australia's Hacking River after 50+ year absence (Environment/Conservation); (4) England's first Dutch-style "fietsstraat" cycle street opens in Cambridge (Innovation/Urban).

item.title: The Morning Lift — Saturday, May 30, 2026
item.description: Four positive stories to start your morning — science, progress, kindness, and wonder. Free audio, about five minutes.
item.itunes:summary: Four positive stories to start your morning — science, progress, kindness, and wonder. Free audio, about five minutes.

item.title: The Morning Lift — Friday, May 29, 2026
item.description: Four positive stories to start your morning — science, progress, kindness, and wonder. Free audio, about five minutes.
